name: Smaranika S.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

The user dashboard is a simple yet powerful tool that you can use on behalf of your clients or give them their own access.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

There's nothing to dislike. They do their job and one thing I currently don't like is having a reconnect all of the listings for either GMB or Facebook.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

This is a really cool tool that will allow me to provide white-label services for my clients. They only need one interface, and all they'll see are functionalities customized just how they like it!
